descriptions.text: Party Quiz Mega Q 2022 is an updated version of the 1993 Mega Drive Game Party Quiz Mega Q with updated questions. It was released exclusively on the Mega Drive Mini 2 in Japan.

Party Quiz Mega Q is a quiz video game developed and published by Sega, which released for the Mega Drive in Japan in 1993. Players participate in a television quiz programme, answering questions in rounds of differing rules, earning or losing points along the way. Up to five players are supported, and the game was released on the Wii's Virtual Console in 2007. In 2014, the soundtrack was released on the Mega Drive 25th Anniversary Album Vol.1 album.
